title: 挖个蛋 Delvegg
description:
《Delvegg》is a desktop idle game where you raise pets that mine resources automatically while idling on your taskbar.

Packed with diverse gameplay mechanics and endless delightful surprises.• Discover dozens of uniquely designed pets, including dwarves, goblins, elves, demons, dragons, vampires, and even mythical creatures. Every pet boasts exclusive unique skills, making every egg hatching full of anticipation.

• 

• The comprehensive pet development system features enhancement, fusion, distillation,refinement, and infusion—craft your one-of-a-kind dream pet to your liking.

• Dozens of gears with distinct mechanics, alongside rarer exclusive equipment and abundant random affixes, offer countless possibilities for team composition building.

• 

• Hundreds of distinct pet affix traits ensure no two pets are identical. Build an overpowered damage dealer or a gold-farming machine; the choice lies entirely with you (and a little luck).

• 

• Random special events pop up throughout your adventure: divine gear falling from the sky, surprise boss raids, and dozens more unexpected encounters.

• 

Extra Game Content• A casual gambling minigame awaits you. Once you unlock the tavern, you can risk all your savings for a chance to earn massive profits! Win bets to unlock secret exclusive rewards.

• 

• Uncover the hidden lore of this world. Extremely rare chances grant you extra decorative buildings and collectibles, letting you piece together the untold secrets of this continent.

• 

• Once you feel your team is powerful enough, take on the challenge of the Demon Tower.

•
description_short: 《Delvegg》 is a desktop idle mining game. The core gameplay revolves around digging eggs, collecting pets, and building your underground mining empire.
